title: Assert tool-to-export consistency in integration suite
description: Current: no integration test verifies that registered MCP tools remain aligned with branding-core exports, so drift can happen silently. Expected: integration test cross-checks matrix export symbols against branding-core module exports and validates registration/invocation suites stay in sync.
acceptance_criteria: Test fails when a matrix export symbol is missing from branding-core index exports
Test fails when a registered tool lacks a matrix export mapping
Integration suite includes a focused command or filter for MCP chain coverage checks
out_of_scope: Changing release notes or changelog workflow
